title: Add Bootstrap Toast Notification for Metric Addition
story: As a DataTools Pro user adding metrics, I want to see a brief toast notification confirming my metric was added successfully, so that I have clear feedback that my entry was saved.
description: When a new metric is successfully saved, a Bootstrap toast notification appears to confirm the action. The toast displays 'Metric Added' with a message indicating the user can start typing their next metric. The toast is triggered after the table reloads with the new metric entry. This provides visual feedback in the rapid-entry workflow introduced in MBT-155.
acceptance_criteria: A Bootstrap toast notification appears when a metric is successfully added
Toast displays 'Metric Added' with a supportive message
Toast auto-dismisses after a brief delay
Toast does not block user interaction with the input field
ux_changes: Added a Bootstrap toast notification that appears on successful metric addition, providing visual feedback to the user during rapid metric entry.
implementation_notes: Uses Bootstrap's native Toast component. The toast DIV is appended to the page body and triggered via `new bootstrap.Toast(element).show()` after successful save and table reload. Initial testing required clearing browser cache to see the change.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the toast. Product owner initially could not see it due to browser caching; developer suggested testing in incognito mode, which resolved the issue.
